parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive range start. The range between from and to must not exceed 120 days; wider ranges return HTTP 422.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Inclusive range end. The range between from and to must not exceed 120 days; wider ranges return HTTP 422.
